overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at dusk, featuring the NCART elevated transit system, neon-lit skyscrapers, and wet reflective streets. The footage from Cyberpunk 2077 shows the player character walking along sidewalks, crossing a major intersection, and observing the bustling Night City environment with moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated transit line

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk beneath the NCART elevated tracks, passing neon signs and digital billboards

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a bench near the building entrance

entered.detail: corner building with distinctive red/orange architectural trim and large windows
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying breaking news content
large teal neon sign for the NCART transit system mounted on building facade
massive concrete and steel elevated railway structure running above the street
thick cylindrical concrete pillar supporting the elevated track structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered sidewalk beneath Night City's elevated transit system. The camera moves forward past a red-trimmed building with digital billboards, while the iconic NCART neon sign glows ahead on the left. The wet concrete reflects the mixed natural and artificial lighting of dusk.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection approach with street signage and crosswalk

events.description: exiting the covered walkway under the elevated tracks into the more open intersection area
approaching the crosswalk as traffic lights show red for vehicles

agents.ego_description: approaching the major intersection, passing other pedestrians on the sidewalk while observing the traffic signals

entered.detail: red street sign indicating Longshore S mounted on traffic gantry
large metal structure spanning the road with traffic signals and signage
massive futuristic glass and steel tower dominating the skyline ahead
tall structure with multiple stacked digital advertisement screens

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the covered walkway to a more open intersection approach. The Longshore S street sign becomes visible ahead, mounted on a traffic gantry. The camera continues walking forward as the NCART tracks recede behind, approaching a crosswalk with moderate pedestrian activity and visible vehicle traffic waiting at the red light.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with wide crosswalks and heavy traffic flow

events.description: stepping off the curb and beginning to cross the wide multi-lane intersection
futuristic black sedan drives through the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection alongside other pedestrians, navigating between moving vehicles

notable_agents.action: sleek black futuristic car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: expansive open paved area of the road intersection with marked crosswalks
bold yellow painted lines marking the pedestrian crossing area
tall illuminated advertising screen displaying commercial content
aerial vehicle hovering above the street with illuminated signage underneath

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the wide open intersection, transitioning from sidewalk to asphalt crosswalk. The space opens up to full sky visibility with the dusk sky visible above the towering skyscrapers. The camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk as a futuristic vehicle passes through, while the massive digital billboards and the hovering advertisement vehicle dominate the visual field.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza area with palm trees and towering corporate skyscrapers

events.description: pausing to look up and around at the surrounding mega-structures and flying vehicle overhead
camera pans to reveal the full scale of the distant spire-topped skyscrapers across the plaza

agents.ego_description: pausing to observe the impressive skyline and flying vehicles while continuing to cross the plaza area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red shirt walking across the crosswalk in the same direction

entered.detail: line of palm trees lining the edge of the street plaza
cluster of massive interconnected corporate towers with illuminated windows
distinctive skyscraper with a sharp spire pinnacle visible against the dusk sky
flying car hovering stationary above the intersection displaying advertisements

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the main intersection, the camera enters a wide open plaza area lined with palm trees. The character slows to look around, taking in the view of the distant mega-building complex with its distinctive spire-topped tower. A hover vehicle floats overhead displaying advertisements, while the camera pans to capture the scale of the surrounding cyberpunk architecture before continuing forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered urban walkway into a vast, open cyberpunk plaza under a dusk sky. It begins on a covered sidewalk beneath the elevated transit system, moving past red-trimmed buildings and glowing NCART signs that reflect off the wet concrete. As the camera leaves the shelter of the walkway, the scene opens toward a street intersection where the NCART tracks recede and a Longshore S street sign appears above waiting vehicle traffic. The perspective then shifts from the sidewalk to the asphalt of a wide crosswalk, exposing the full scale of the towering skyscrapers and hovering advertisement vehicles against the darkening sky. Finally, the camera enters a spacious plaza lined with palm trees, panning across the massive architecture and a distant spire-topped mega-building before continuing forward.
